(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)

---- MODULE RingTerminationDetection
/*----------------------------------------------------------------
  An abstract specification of termination detection in a ring with
  asynchronous communication.
----------------------------------------------------------------*/
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANTS
    Nodes          \* finite set of node identifiers
    NodeMsgSize    \* maximum number of pending messages per node

/*----------------------------------------------------------------
  Variables
----------------------------------------------------------------*/
VARIABLES
    active,          \* [node -> Bool], whether a node is active
    pending,         \* [node -> Nat], number of pending messages at node
    terminationDetected \* [Bool], whether termination has been detected

/*----------------------------------------------------------------
  State type
----------------------------------------------------------------*/
STATE == [ active : Nodes -> Bool,
           pending : Nodes -> Nat,
           terminationDetected : Bool ]

---- MODULE RingTermination ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, Sequences, TLC

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(* --- Module Parameters ------------------------------------------- *)
CONSTANTS
    Nodes,                \* Finite set of node identifiers
    InitActive,           \* Finite subset of Nodes that are initially active
    InitInactive          \* Finite subset of Nodes that are initially inactive

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(* --- Variables ----------------------------------------------- *)
VARIABLES
    active,               \* Finite subset of Nodes that are currently active
    terminated,           \* Finite subset of Nodes that have terminated
    terminationDetected   \* BOOLEAN: whether termination has been detected

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(* --- Helper Functions ------------------------------------------ *)
IsActive(i) == i \in active
IsTerminated(i) == i \in terminated
IsInactive(i) == i \in Nodes \ (active \cup terminated)

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(* --- Initial State --------------

---- MODULE RingTerminationDetection
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS
    Nodes          \* Finite set of node identifiers
    InitActive     \* Finite set of nodes that are initially active

ASSUME
    \* Nodes must be a non-empty finite set
    Nodes \subseteq [1..100] /\ Nodes \neq {}
    \* InitActive must be a subset of Nodes
    InitActive \subseteq Nodes

VARIABLES
    active,      \* Set of currently active nodes
    terminated,  \* Set of nodes that have terminated
    terminatedDetected  \* Boolean: has termination been detected?

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(* Helper definitions                                             *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)

(* A node terminates when it is active and has no outgoing activation *)
Terminate(node) == node \in active /\ \A j \in Nodes : j \notin active

(* A node activates another node *)
Activate(i, j) == i \in active /\ j \in Nodes /\ j \notin active

(* All nodes are inactive *)
AllInactive == active = {}

(* Termination is detected when all nodes are inactive *)
TerminationDetected == AllInactive

---- MODULE AdaptiveMutex
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS
    Threads \in SUBSET Nat,
    SLEEP_TIME \in Nat

VARIABLES
    mode,        \* mode[t] \in {"spinning", "sleeping", "holding"} for t \in Threads
    holder       \* holder \in Threads \cup {None}

(* --algorithm Definitions ----------------------------------------------------------- *)

(* --TYPE OK --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ mode \in [Threads -> {"spinning", "sleeping", "holding"}]
    /\ holder \in Threads \cup {None}

(* --INITIAL STATE ----------------------------------------------------------- *)
Init ==
    /\ mode = [t \in Threads |-> "spinning"]
    /\ holder = None

(* --NEXT STATE ----------------------------------------------------------- *)
Next ==
    \* A thread can start spinning if it is not spinning or sleeping
    \/ \E t \in Threads :
        /\ mode[t] \in {"sleeping", "holding"}
        /\ mode' = [mode EXCEPT ![t] = "spinning"]
        /\ holder' = holder
    \* A thread may transition from spinning to sleeping
    \/ \E t \in Threads :
        /\ mode[t] = "spinning"
        /\ mode' = [mode EXCEPT ![t] = "sleeping"]
        /\ ho

---- MODULE AndersonMutex
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat,          \* Number of processes
    P \in 1..N          \* Current process (only used for local views)

VARIABLES
    turn,                \* index of the process whose turn it is
    flag,                \* array of booleans per process
    queue                \* FIFO queue of waiting processes

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(* Type definitions *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)

(* The set of all process identifiers *)
ProcessSet == 1..N

(* The domain of the queue: finite sequences of ProcessSet *)
QueueDomain == Seq(ProcessSet)

(* The domain of the flag array: a mapping from ProcessSet to BOOLEAN *)
FlagDomain == [ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(* Initialization *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Init ==
    /\ turn \in ProcessSet
    /\ flag \in FlagDomain
    /\ queue \in QueueDomain
    /\ turn = 1
    /\ flag = [p \in ProcessSet |-> FALSE]
    /\ queue = <<>>

---- MODULE GC ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS
    Objects \in SUBSET [id: Id, fields: [field: Id -> Id]]
    Id \in SUBSET Int
    Field \in SUBSET Id
    FromSpace \in SUBSET Id
    ToSpace \in SUBSET Id
    GcRoots \in SUBSET Id

(* Each object is identified by an integer id. *)
(* Objects maps id to an object record. *)
(* Objects contains all objects in the system. *)

ASSUME
    /\ FromSpace \subset Objects.id
    /\ ToSpace \subset Objects.id
    /\ FromSpace \cap ToSpace = {}
    /\ GcRoots \subset FromSpace

VARIABLES
    objs,          \* mapping id -> record
    fromSpace,     \* set of ids
    toSpace,       \* set of ids
    copied,        \* set of ids that have been copied to toSpace
    worklist       \* set of ids to be processed

(* The structure of an object *)
Object == [id: Id, fields: [field: Field -> Id]]

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ objs \in [Id -> Object]
    /\ fromSpace \subset Id
    /\ toSpace \subset Id
    /\ copied \subset Id
    /\ worklist \subset Id
    /\ \A o \in Id : o \in DOMAIN objs
    /\ \A o \in DOMAIN objs : 
        objs[o].id \in Id
        /\ objs[o].fields \in [Field -> Id]
        /\ \A f \in Field : objs[o].fields[
